response: To cut out sugar from your daily diet, start by [identifying hidden sugar sources] in processed foods. Replace sugary snacks with [healthier alternatives] like fruits or nuts. Read food labels carefully to avoid added sugars. Use natural sweeteners like stevia instead of refined sugar. Limit sugary beverages and opt for water or herbal teas. Gradually reduce sugar intake to avoid cravings. Be mindful of portion sizes and meal timing. [Track your progress] to stay motivated and make lasting changes.
